name: fppfurtado-pragmatic-dev-toolkit
description: Personal marketplace exposing pragmatic-dev-toolkit — a Claude Code plugin for the flat & pragmatic development workflow.

plugins.name: pragmatic-dev-toolkit
plugins.description: Workflow skills (/new-feature, /new-adr, /run-plan), Python testing skill (/gen-tests-python), YAGNI/QA/security reviewers, and self-gated hooks (.env protection + pytest) for flat & pragmatic projects.
